about.title: ABOUT ME
paragraphs: I'm Fache, a Fullstack Developer with +3 years collaborating with design and development teams to create high-impact digital experiences.
Currently working with TypeScript, Next.js, and PostgreSQL, always exploring new and improved techniques and tools.
Passionate about building applications that not only solve problems but also deliver smooth and engaging user experiences.
I've been part of teams dedicated to developing high-quality, high-performance, and adaptable products.

activity.title: ACTIVITY
activity.subtitle: What I've been up to lately

posts.title: Building interfaces with glassmorphism
posts.excerpt: Glassmorphism has established itself as a design trend that combines transparency, blur and subtle borders to create modern interfaces. In this article we explore how to implement it with CSS and styled-components...

posts.title: Performant animations with GSAP and React
posts.excerpt: GSAP is one of the most powerful animation libraries in the web ecosystem. Integrating it with React requires understanding component lifecycle and how to handle DOM references correctly...

posts.title: Scalable design systems in TypeScript
posts.excerpt: A good design system doesn't just define colors and typography, it establishes typed contracts between design and development. We explore how TypeScript helps us maintain consistency...
